summary: Iteration 17 tested 3 new features (header avatar relocation, Form View, Developer API). Backend: 22/22 pytest PASS covering form CRUD, public form (no-auth) submission with required-field validation, API key creation/list/revoke, /api/api-keys/whoami, /api/v1/boards|/{id}|/items, workspace-scope 403, revoked-key 401. Frontend: header avatar + dropdown + sidebar profile removal verified, Form tab + create + public URL + 39 visible/required toggles + save toast verified, Developer tab UI verified (modal, scope select, name field, Generate button, revoke). CRITICAL: PublicFormPage at /f/{id} CRASHES with React runtime error 'A <Select.Item /> must have a value prop that is not an empty string' when board has status/priority columns with empty-string option labels — this prevents the entire public form from rendering, blocking the user-facing form submission flow.

ui_bugs.issue: Renders <SelectItem value={o.label}> for every option. Pipeline board's Status column has options with empty-string label, which throws 'A <Select.Item /> must have a value prop that is not an empty string' and crashes the whole page. data-testid='public-form-name' and 'public-form-submit' never appear because the React tree fails to render.

ui_bugs.component: DeveloperTab — Generate Personal Access Token modal
ui_bugs.issue: Token name input placeholder is 'e.g. CV Parser Script'. Clicking Generate without a name correctly shows 'Name required' toast, but the field has no data-testid (e.g. 'api-key-name-input') — automated tests must guess by placeholder.
ui_bugs.selector: Generate Personal Access Token modal > Token Name input

integration_issues.issue: Cannot be exercised end-to-end in UI because the page crashes before rendering when board has status/priority options with empty labels. Backend POST /api/forms/public/{id}/submit works correctly (verified via API tests).

action_items: FIX (CRITICAL): In /app/frontend/src/pages/PublicFormPage.jsx FieldInput, filter out options with falsy/empty label OR provide a synthetic non-empty value. Suggested: const safeOpts = opts.filter(o => o.label && o.label.trim()); then map safeOpts. This single fix unblocks public form rendering for any board that has empty-labelled status/priority options.
ADD (LOW): data-testid='api-key-name-input' on the Token Name input inside DeveloperTab's generate dialog for cleaner E2E selectors.
critical_code_review_comments: PublicFormPage relies on SelectItem with value={o.label}; needs a guard or fallback (e.g. value={o.label || `__opt_${o.id}`}) since column option labels are user-editable and can be empty.

Backend POST /api/forms response_model=Form returns Pydantic model — this currently includes Mongo _id only because pydantic ignores extras; the explicit _serialize_form helper is good. Confirmed no _id leakage in any tested response.

API key full token is correctly returned only at creation; subsequent GET /api/api-keys never returns 'key' or 'key_hash'. Hashing uses sha256(token) — strong enough for an internal MVP but consider HMAC with a secret pepper or argon2 for production.
form_routes /forms/public/{id}/submit accepts any column_values dict without per-field type validation (e.g. number column accepts string). Acceptable for MVP but worth typed validation eventually.
DeveloperTab modal shows 'User — access all my boards' as default scope; workspace scope option works and creates a workspace-scoped key (verified via backend tests including 403 cross-workspace).
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up: TEST_form_iter17 form, TEST_user_key + TEST_ws_key API keys, TEST_iter17_other_ws workspace + TEST_iter17_other_board (left in DB — minor; cleanup not implemented in test). Created board items: TEST_iter17_item_ok (form), TEST_iter17_api_item (API), TEST_iter17_pub_v3 (UI attempt — failed due to crash).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend is solid (22/22 pytest pass — preserve test_iteration17_forms_apikeys.py for regression). The only remaining issue is the PublicFormPage SelectItem crash for boards with empty-label status options. After main agent fixes PublicFormPage, retest by visiting /f/<form_id> for Pipeline board (id 80443bd5-2839-4909-955b-e13157def5eb) and confirming public-form-name + public-form-submit + public-form-success testids render. Test form ids created during this run: c53cd404-e9c2-4cbf-9351-272e0e3afd3a and d66fe5fa-8ce0-... (still in DB unless cleaned).
rca of the issue: RCA: PublicFormPage.jsx FieldInput maps board column options to <SelectItem value={o.label}>. The Pipeline board's Status column contains an option with an empty-string label (likely a 'blank/unset' option seeded in the DB). Radix UI's SelectItem throws when value is an empty string because empty string is reserved for 'cleared' state. Result: error boundary at app level shows 'Uncaught runtime errors' overlay and the form tree never mounts, so testids never exist. Reproduction: open /f/<any_form_for_pipeline_board> in incognito → red error overlay. Mitigation: filter options where !o.label or trim()=='' before .map; or substitute a placeholder value like `__empty_${o.id}` and display the label as a dash.
